name: polyserver
description: VerScript PolyServer — unified backend that dynamically mounts all org services

scripts.prestart: make -C verscript_src clean 2>/dev/null && make -C verscript_src 2>/dev/null && cp verscript_src/verscript ./verscript 2>/dev/null && chmod +x ./verscript 2>/dev/null || true

author: VerScript
